iree_add_all_subdirs()

iree_cc_binary(

    test_fixture_generator
  SRCS
    "test_fixture_generator.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::hal
    iree::hal::utils::profile_file
    iree::io::file_handle
  TESTONLY
)

iree_local_py_test(
  NAME
    render_test
  SRC
    "render_test.py"
  PACKAGE_DIRS
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}"
)

iree_local_py_test(
  NAME
    cli_test
  SRC
    "cli_test.py"

    "--fixture-generator=$<TARGET_FILE:iree_tools_profile_test_fixture_generator>"
